info.title: FlareAuth Management API
info.description: Stable Management API contract for FlareAuth v1.0.

get.summary: List permissions assigned to a role

delete.summary: Revoke all sessions for a user

post.summary: Ban a user using the compatibility action route
Request a password reset for a user

delete.summary: Revoke all sessions for a user

post.summary: Remove a user ban using the compatibility action route
Request a user password reset using the compatibility route
Create a password reset request for a user email

201.description: Application created. Confidential clients include raw clientSecret once.

200.description: Client secret metadata collection returned. Raw secret values are not included.

201.description: Client secret rotated. The raw secret is returned once in this response.

post.summary: Create or replace a role assignment
Create or replace a role assignment using the compatibility route

204.description: Request completed with no response body.

clientSecret.description: Raw secret material returned only once for confidential client creation.

prefix.description: Non-sensitive secret prefix for operator identification.

clientSecret.description: Raw secret material returned only once after creation or rotation.

clientSecretBinding.description: Reference to deployment-managed secret material; never the secret value.

CreateConnectorRequest.description: Create uses the shared connector contract. Enabled connectors require clientId and clientSecretBinding. Disabled draft connectors may omit runtime credentials. Generic OAuth connectors use either issuer discovery or explicit authorizationEndpoint plus tokenEndpoint.

clientSecretBinding.description: Reference to deployment-managed secret material; never the secret value.
Reference to deployment-managed secret material; never the secret value.
